"use client"; import { PlayCircle, Download, Copy, Share2, Search, ArrowLeft, MoreHorizontal, BookOpen, Clock, FileText, Layout, Zap, Edit3, Type, Highlighter, MessageSquare } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useState } from "react"; export default function NotesPage() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("Detailed Notes"); const transcript = [ { time: "05:12", text: "In this lecture, we explore the fundamental principles of wave-particle duality and how it changed our understanding of subatomic behavior." }, { time: "08:45", text: "The Schrödinger equation represents a system's quantum state as a wave function, providing probabilities rather than certainties." }, { time: "12:30", text: "Heisenberg's Uncertainty Principle states that we cannot simultaneous observe both position and momentum of a particle." } ]; return (
{/* Page Header / Toolbar */}

Lecture Notes: Quantum Mechanics 101

Uploaded Oct 25, 2023 • 45m audio

{/* Split Screen Layout */}
{/* Left: Original Material / Video Preview & Transcript */}
{/* Media Player Compact */}
24:12 / 45:00
1x CC
{/* Transcript */}

Transcript

{transcript.map((t, i) => (
{t.time}

{t.text}

))}
{/* Right: AI Generated Notes */}
{/* Note Style Selector */}
{["Bullet Notes", "Detailed Notes", "Exam Study", "Action Items"].map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* Notes Content */}
{/* Document Title */}

Principles of Quantum States

Physics • AI Generated Summary
{/* Section 1 */}

1. Overview of Wave Mechanics

The lecture defines quantum mechanics not as a set of rules for particles, but as a framework for describing the underlying probabilistic nature of reality at the smallest scales. Unlike classical mechanics, observables are not deterministic.

{/* Section 2 Callout */}

Key Takeaways

  • • Subatomic particles exhibit both wave-like and particle-like characteristics depending on the measurement.
  • • The Uncertainty Principle is not a limit of technological measurement, but a fundamental law of physics.
  • • Wave function collapse occurs upon observation, transitioning from probability into certainty.
{/* Section 3 Math Block */}

2. Important Formulas

The standard representation of the wave function in one dimension:

ψ(x, t) = A e^(i(kx − ωt)) The Standard Wave Function Representation
); }

{/* Header Area */}

Ready to tackle your studying for today?

"use client"; import { Calendar, Clock, Plus, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, BrainCircuit, Timer, Coffee, Zap, Bell, CheckCircle2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Play } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; export default function PlannerPage() { const days = ["Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun"]; const studySessions = [ { title: "Advanced Calculus", time: "09:00 AM", duration: "1h 30m", category: "Math", status: "completed" }, { title: "Cell Biology", time: "11:30 AM", duration: "2h 00m", category: "Science", status: "upcoming" }, { title: "Renaissance Art History", time: "02:00 PM", duration: "1h 00m", category: "Humanities", status: "upcoming" }, ]; return (
{/* Left 2 Columns: Calendar View */}

Your customized study schedule powered by AI.

))}

))}

messages.message: Using `` could result in slower LCP and higher bandwidth. Consider using `` from `next/image` to automatically optimize images. This may incur additional usage or cost from your provider. See: https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/no-img-element
img elements must have an alt prop, either with meaningful text, or an empty string for decorative images.

Introducing Lectify AI 2.0 Study Smarter with
Lectify AI Turn lectures and videos into structured notes, flashcards, quizzes, and PDFs instantly. The modern workspace for the productive student. Start for free See how it works

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

A minimalist, powerful toolkit designed to optimize your study workflow.

{[ { icon: FileText, title: "Structured Notes", desc: "AI transforms messy transcripts into beautifully formatted, markdown-ready notes." }, { icon: Zap, title: "Instant Flashcards", desc: "Automatically generate Anki-style flashcards from your lecture material." }, { icon: PlayCircle, title: "Smart Quizzes", desc: "Test your comprehension with auto-generated multiple choice and short answer quizzes." }, { icon: MessageCircle, title: "Chat with Lecture", desc: "Ask specific questions about the lecture and get precise answers backed by citations." }, { icon: Clock, title: "Study Planner", desc: "Organize your study sessions with our intelligent, spaced-repetition planner." }, { icon: Layout, title: "Export Anywhere", desc: "Download as PDF, Notion export, or simple markdown. Your notes, your rules." } ].map((f, i) => (
